pool_warning: ⚠️ No usable proxies left in the forward pool (all have failed) - the local proxy can't forward traffic right now. Re-validate or remove the failed proxies, or pick a new pool.
forward.title: Local Forward Proxies
forward.status_line: HTTP proxy: {http}  |  SOCKS5 proxy: {socks}  |  Current pool: {count} proxies ({usable} usable)
hint.https_443: ⚠️ 443-only = this proxy only allows CONNECT to port 443, so it's only good for HTTPS sites - don't use it as a general-purpose SOCKS5/any-port upstream.
filters.title: Filters
https.only443_title: This proxy's CONNECT only allows port 443, so it can only reach HTTPS sites; using it as a general SOCKS5/any-port upstream will fail
pool.failed_title: Too many consecutive forwarding failures, skipped during load balancing. Re-validate or remove from the forward pool
job.summary_scrape: Done: scraped {scraped} / unique {unique} / reused {reused} / freshly checked {fresh} / alive {alive}
alert.select_validate: Please select proxies to validate first
alert.select_pool: Please select proxies to add to the forward pool first
alert.select_remove_pool: Please select proxies to remove from the pool first
alert.select_delete: Please select proxies to delete first
confirm.delete_proxies: Permanently delete the selected {count} proxies from the list? If they're in the forward pool, they'll be removed from there too.
settings.section_scrape: Scrape / Validation Settings (applies immediately, no restart needed)
settings.section_scheduled: Scheduled Tasks (applies immediately, no restart needed)
settings.section_network: Network Settings (requires a service restart to take effect)
settings.section_interface: Interface Settings (applies immediately, no restart needed)
settings.geo_lookup: Auto-fill geolocation (direct to ip-api.com, no proxy)
settings.geo_verify_via_proxy: Confirm proxy location via a network service (connects through the proxy to a third-party service for a more accurate but slower exit-location check)
settings.limit: Max proxies per scrape/validate run (blank = unlimited)
settings.sched_pool_refresh_enabled: Periodically add the lowest-latency proxies to the pool (merged and deduped with the existing pool)
settings.sched_pool_top_n: Add the top N lowest-latency proxies each time
settings.sched_pool_topup_enabled: Auto top-up with the lowest-latency proxies when the pool runs short
settings.sched_pool_topup_min_count: Top up when usable proxies fall below this count
settings.sched_pool_https_only: When auto-adding to the forward pool (periodic refresh + auto top-up), only pick proxies that support HTTPS
restart.network_pending: Network settings changed but the service hasn't restarted yet - it's still running on the old address/port.
restart.network_saved: Network settings saved - a service restart is required to take effect.
restart.confirm: Restart the service now? The page will briefly disconnect and auto-refresh after a few seconds.
restart.reconnect_failed: Couldn't reconnect automatically after the restart - please refresh the page manually.
save.success_restart: Saved. The following settings require a service restart to take effect: {fields}
